economic_notes: Nation has investments in White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc., White Bear Lake Resort Inc., and White Bear Holdings Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. Oil and gas enterprises consolidated. Dispute over northern boundary lands with funds in suspense estimated over $15,000,000. Bear Claw Community Development Inc. distributes proceeds from Dakota Dunes, Painted Hand, and Living Skies casinos.
notes: Nation is in Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 Territory), not Alberta. Province set to SK. 9 entities consolidated including oil and gas enterprises and development partnerships. 3 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (White Bear Lake Resort Inc., White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc., White Bear Holdings Ltd.). Approximately $8.7M in suspense funds at Ottawa Trust Fund related to disputed northern boundary lands, with total suspense estimated over $15M — not accessible to the Nation. Contributions line is negative (-$69,250) in 2024 actuals. Child and Family Services expenses of $288,375 and CMHC expenses of $515,163 included in total but not mapped to standard categories. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($14,202,488) + CMHC ($337,715) + SITAG ($192,427) + Other Federal ($109,482) + FSIN ($1,171,548) + Revenue trust funds FNT ($11,960 excluded as trust transfer not government transfer) = ISC+CMHC+SITAG+Other Federal+FSIN = $16,013,660; FNT trust funds included bringing total to approximately $16,024,660. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
